issue_title: [BUG]: ColourfulText do not show on the document, and rendering error
issue_body_preview:
### Environment

System:
OS: macOS 15.0.1
CPU: (8) arm64 Apple M2
Memory: 71.69 MB / 16.00 GB
Shell: 3.7.1 - /opt/homebrew/bin/fish
Binaries:
Node: 23.9.0 - /opt/homebrew/bin/node
npm: 10.9.2 - /opt/homebrew/bin/npm
pnpm: 10.4.1 - /opt/homebrew/bin/pnpm
Browsers:
Chrome: 134.0.6998.118
Safari: 18.0.
test_description_zh: 访问文档页面中包含 ColourfulText 组件的部分，观察该组件是否正常渲染并显示彩色文字效果。
expected_result_zh: ColourfulText 组件应在文档页面中正常显示，文字带有彩色渐变或动画效果，无渲染错误或空白区域。
